message:
test(e2e): add semantic search toggle tests for SpotlightSearch

Add 4 new E2E tests for the semantic vs BM25 search toggle:
- Toggle button existence and visibility
- aria-pressed state changes on click
- localStorage persistence across sessions
- Accessible title attribute updates

Also fix two pre-existing build errors:
- Add missing generateInstallOneLiner export from core/export
- Add missing sizeClasses object in UserAvatar component

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-l3x6 (partial)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
